name: Spicy Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lbs HOT Italian sausage, removed from skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry sausage and onion on medium high heat until cooked through. Drain excess fat and set aside.
2. In a separate pan, fry beef with salt, pepper, and garlic over medium high heat. Drain any excess fat.
3. Return the beef mixture to the original pan. Add the sausage and onion mixture.
4. Gradually add Chief Boy-ar-de spaghetti sauce, tomato sauce, tomato paste, and water with each addition, stirring well after each addition.
5. Add the mushrooms with their liquid.
6. Season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
7. Stir in Italian Seasoning and Spaghetti Sauce Seasoning (both Spice Islands brand) until fully incorporated.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for at least 2 hours. The longer it cooks, the better the flavor. For best results, prepare this sauce the day before serving.
